signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded $260 Million Contract to Supply DIRCM Self-Protection Systems for Germany's A400M Aircraft Fleet
signals.description: The contract, to be executed over a 6-year period, follows a procurement decision by the Federal Office for Equipment, Information Technology and Operations of the Bundeswehr (BAAINBw). | EDGAR: 0001178913-25-002470

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded Two Contracts in an Aggregate Amount of Approximately $260 Million for the Supply of Advanced Airborne Munitions to the Israel M
signals.description: (NASDAQ: ESLT) (TASE: ESLT) (“Elbit Systems” or the “Company”) announced today, that it was awarded two contracts in an aggregate amount of approximately $260 million for the supply of advanced airborne munitions to the Israel Ministry of Defense (IMOD). | EDGAR: 0001178913-25-002709

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded $1.635 Billion Contract to Deliver a Range of Defense Solutions to a European Country
signals.description: (NASDAQ: ESLT) (TASE: ESLT) (“Elbit Systems” or the “Company”) announced today that is has been awarded $1.635 Billion contract to deliver a range of defense solutions to a European country. | EDGAR: 0001178913-25-002820

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Signs a $2.3 Billion International Contract
signals.description: (NASDAQ: ESLT) (TASE: ESLT) (“Elbit Systems” or the “Company”) announced today that it has signed an international contract for a strategic solution in an amount of approximately $2.3 billion. | EDGAR: 0001178913-25-003866

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded Contracts in an Aggregate Amount of $210 Million from Israel Ministry of Defense for Tank Upgrades
signals.description: (NASDAQ: ESLT) (TASE: ESLT) (“Elbit Systems” or the “Company”) announced today that it has been awarded contracts from the Israel Ministry of Defense in an aggregate amount of approximately $210 million for the upgrade of Merkava Main Battle Tanks (MBTs). | EDGAR: 0001178913-25-003892

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded $228 Million Follow-on Contract to Provide Iron Fist APS for U.S. Army Bradley IFV Upgrades
signals.description: Army Bradley IFV Upgrades Haifa, Israel, January 26, 2026 – Elbit Systems Ltd . | EDGAR: 0001178913-26-000214

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded Contracts Valued at Approximately $435 Million for Advanced Defense Systems
signals.description: (NASDAQ: ESLT) (TASE: ESLT) (“Elbit Systems” or the “Company”) announced today that it was awarded several contracts with a total value of approximately $435 million from an international customer. | EDGAR: 0001178913-26-000482

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded $277 Million Contracts for 30mm Turrets and Munitions by an International Customer
signals.description: (NASDAQ: ESLT) (TASE: ESLT) (“Elbit Systems” or the “Company”) announced today that it has been awarded contracts in an aggregate value of approximately $277 million by an international customer for supply of 30 mm turrets and munitions. | EDGAR: 0001178913-26-000537

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded $750 Million to Supply PULS™ Rocket Artillery Systems to the Hellenic Armed Forces
signals.description: announced today, further to its announcement from December 16, 2025, that as part of an agreement between the Israeli Ministry of Defense and the Hellenic Ministry of National Defense, it was awarded a contract worth approximately $750 million (€650 million) to supply Precise & Universal Launching S | EDGAR: 0001178913-26-002010

signals.title: IL — Elbit Systems Awarded Contracts in an Aggregate Amount of Approximately $200 Million for the Supply of Advanced Airborne Munitions to the Israel Minis
signals.description: announced today, that during Operation “Roaring Lion”, the Company was awarded several contracts in an aggregate amount of approximately $200 million for the supply of advanced airborne munitions to the Israel Ministry of Defense (IMOD). | EDGAR: 0001178913-26-002179
